## Verification

- [ ] Tests pass with `python -m pytest`.
- [ ] Public behavior is documented.
- [ ] Storage, retrieval, or concurrency changes include benchmark results.
- [ ] No runtime databases, vector data, secrets, or personal memory content are included.
